concerns.text: T013 (US1) implements fetching from 'arXiv/OpenPolymer sources' but omits the 'manual literature extraction' path required by FR-001. Since US1 is the data foundation for US2 and US3, the missing ingestion path for the third required source creates a hard dependency gap: downstream tasks (T019, T028) cannot execute on a complete dataset if the manual extraction logic is never implemented.

T014 (US1) generates `missing_data_report.json` for the >20% halt condition, but fails to include a task to generate `clarification_flag.json` for the 5-20% imputation range mandated by FR-006 and SC-005. This artifact is a prerequisite for the 'Data Hygiene' check in the plan; its absence breaks the data-flow chain for the missing-data handling logic.

T028 (US3) generates '50+ sustainable candidate SMILES' but does not explicitly include the generation of the 'petrochemical benchmark' set required for the Mann-Whitney U test in T030. T030 depends on two distinct distributions (bio vs. petro); without a task to generate the benchmark set, T030 has no input data to compare against, violating the producer-consumer flow.

T021 hardcodes the fallback depth sequence (6 then 4) while the spec (FR-003) uses a `[deferred]` placeholder. While the Plan resolved this, the task description should explicitly reference the resolved values from the Plan to ensure the implementation matches the final design intent, avoiding ambiguity during execution.
